mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_accounts (id, family_id, user_id, balance, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{balance}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
